title: Bike lanes and speed cameras disappear from the DOT's list of proven safety measures
description: The Federal Highway Administration quietly stripped bike lanes and other safety recommendations from a key list of best practices. Critics say those measures are proven to cut crashes and save lives.

title: DHS pledged body cams for all immigration agents. Months later, that hasn't happened
description: In recent days, federal immigration agents fatally shot two immigrant fathers. None of the federal officers involved were wearing body cameras, the agency said.

title: Trump earned billions last year. Some Pennsylvania swing voters say they don't care
description: Key voters in Pennsylvania are split on whether President Trump earning a big windfall last year is a big deal or not. Their reaction reveals a level of cynicism about many in the political class.

title: Kevin Warsh says the Fed is determined to bring rising prices under control
description: In his first testimony as the new chairman of the Federal Reserve, Kevin Warsh shared his views on a range of topics from artificial intelligence to immigration.

title: Trump's Iran notice aims to reset war powers clock amid growing political risks
description: The Trump administration's notification to restart the war with Iran aims to reset a 60-day clock for military action, but questions are mounting about public support as midterms approach.

title: Lawmakers grill national intelligence director nominee at confirmation hearing
description: Jay Clayton, President Trump's nominee for director of national intelligence, faced questions about the president's claims of election fraud at a Senate confirmation hearing Wednesday

title: House vote exposes Democrats’ widening divide over Israel
description: The symbolic vote showed how far Democratic politics on Israel have shifted, as progressive candidates turn anger over Gaza and U.S. military aid into a campaign issue.

title: Takeaways from Todd Blanche's confirmation hearing for attorney general
description: Todd Blanche remained composed throughout the hours-long hearing, but faced several testy moments during questioning as he seeks to win the support of all Republican senators on the committee.

title: Key House Democrats voice support for amendment to cancel Israel defense funding
description: The announcements reflect a growing disconnect between the Democratic establishment, with its long-standing support for the U.S. ally, and the party’s left wing.

title: Trump relished in being compared to dictators like Hitler and Stalin, journalist says
description: The New York Times journalist Jonathan Swan says the president is fixated on becoming a "great man of history" during his second term. Swan's new book, written with Maggie Haberman, is Regime Change.

title: Acting AG Todd Blanche faces high-stakes confirmation hearing
description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche will be on Capitol Hill Wednesday for his high-stakes confirmation hearing to lead the Justice Department permanently.

title: Sen. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., on the confirmation hearing for AG nominee Todd Blanche
description: NPR's Leila Fadel asks Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff what he plans to ask Attorney General nominee Todd Blanche at his confirmation hearing.
